notes: Toronto Public Library's finance page labels CAD 4,298,350 as 'Revenues (fines, fees)'. This is the closest local analogue to Ahmedabad Public Library / M.J. Library Network's disclosed library income line.

The operating budget is 2026 while TPL activity outcomes in tpl_key_facts_2024.json are 2024. The paper treats this as a latest-available institutional capacity comparison, not a same-year audited performance table.
